term: We Could Play This Game Naked
englishDefinitions: A provocative or joking statement meaning that the game is so simple or familiar that it could be played without clothes.
Used humorously or flirtatiously to suggest confidence, ease, or a lack of concern about the situation.
persianTranslation: می‌توانستیم این بازی را لخت انجام دهیم
این بازی را می‌شود به‌قدری راحت انجام داد که انگار می‌توانی لخت هم بازی کنی
عبارت شوخی/طعنه‌آمیز برای نشان دادن راحتی یا بی‌پروایی
examples: He laughed and said, 'We could play this game naked.'
After so many rounds, we could play this game naked and still win.
The comment was obviously a joke: 'We could play this game naked.'
antonyms: we don't know what we're doing
